entry_exit.entry: When a volatility spike signal is triggered, buy VIX-related ETFs or options proxies.
entry_exit.exit: When the 3-day moving average of forecast volatility drops back below the 7-day average, close the position.

signal_logic.trigger: Calculate the daily standard deviation of temperature forecasts over the next 7 days for major economic cities. If the 3-day moving average of this standard deviation rises by more than 20% compared to the previous week's average, trigger a volatility spike signal.

position_sizing.scaling: Linear scaling with the magnitude of the volatility spike. For example, if the spike is 40% above baseline, allocate 10%.
